# backgroundColor()

**Instance Method**

Retrieves the background color of the composition parameter view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func backgroundColor() -> NSColor!
```

## Return Value

The color of the background.

## Setting and Getting the Background Color

- **setBackgroundColor(_:)**: Sets the background color of the composition parameter view.
